calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jayesh N. Patel, who was not present at today's hearing.
Nevnit Patel, plaintiff's business partner, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Tremeka Flemmings.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jayesh N. Patel, and against defendant Tremeka Flemmings as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $714.00.
Holdover Damages - $119.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $255.00.

Total - $1,088.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Jayesh N. Patel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 905 Columbus Avenue, #118, San Francisco, CA 94112. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (D218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Jayesh Patel, is present and appears in propria persona.

Defendant, Tremeka Flemmings, is not present.

Settlement conference is off calendar due to non appearance of the defendant. Trial date of APR-05-2010 remains set.
